title: Hypixel Mod API
description: Mod API for interfacing with the Hypixel Server.
body:
The Hypixel Mod API is a method for interfacing with the Hypixel Server. 

If you are a player you may need to install this mod as a requirement for other mods to communicate with the Hypixel Server for specific data. You should download and install the relevant version for your mod loader and Minecraft version.

If you are a developer you can read more about the Mod API on the [GitHub Repository](https://github.com/HypixelDev/ModAPI).
